chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 255 - وَقَالَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «أَلْقُوا اَلشَّعْرَ عَنْكُمْ فَإِنَّهُ يُحَسِّنُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.255 - Abu Al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
'Remove the hair from your bodies, for it enhances (your appearance).'
